channel.title: Event on Apache Texera
channel.description: Recent content in Event on Apache Texera

item.title: dkNET-AI · Apache Texera Agent Hackathon
item.description:
The dkNET-AI · Apache Texera Agent Hackathon brought together researchers, students, and data enthusiasts at UC Irvine from May 14–18, 2026 for an intensive four-day sprint focused on human-AI collaborative data science.

Hosted by the NIH dkNET project and the Apache Texera team, the event challenged participants to build intuitive, visual workflows in which advanced AI agents co-author data pipelines alongside humans.

By the numbers

  • 23 active participants
  • 46 hours of non-stop hacking
  • 35 total project submissions (33 accepted for formal evaluation)

Read the full recap on the blog →

item.title: dkNET-AI · Apache Texera Agent Hackathon
item.description:
May 14–18, 2026 · UC Irvine

We are thrilled to celebrate the successful conclusion of the recent dkNET-AI · Apache Texera Agent Hackathon! Brought together by the NIH dkNET project and hosted by the Apache Texera team, this intensive, in-person event challenged participants to build the future of human-AI collaborative data science.
